subcodes.first_line: They have imprisoned Us in a city of unwholesome air, wherein naught can be perceived save pestilence, and from whose precincts no sound can be heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حبسونا فی مدینه ردیه الهواء لایری فیها الا الاوخام و لایسمع من ارجائها
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
